user.title: Connect to Pi-hole
user.description: Configure the Pi-hole API used for presence tracking.

data_description.host: Pi-hole base address, including its protocol.
data_description.api_mode: Auto detect tries the Pi-hole v6 API before the legacy API.
data_description.password: Optional password used to create a Pi-hole v6 API session.
data_description.api_token: Optional token for the pre-v6 PHP API.
data_description.away_time: Seconds without a DNS query before a device is marked not home.
data_description.stale_device_days: Devices without a DNS query for this many days are ignored.
